title: Moving Average Process Generation
description: This flowchart illustrates how a Moving Average (MA) process generates an observed time series value by combining a current shock with a weighted sum of past shocks.
relationships: ε_t, ε_{t-1}, and ε_{t-2} are the input random shocks
The shocks are multiplied by their respective model parameters (θ)
X_t is the sum of the current shock and the weighted past shocks
